# ast-grep/ast-grep

ast-grep (sg) — structural code search and rewrite tool

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `sg` | Run ast-grep |
| `sg --help` | Show help and available options |
| `sg --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
sg --version

# Show help
sg --help
```
